A Private Evening

How to build a million-dollar clothing brand in 12 months.

The Studio

From vision
to market.

Masters Linea is a private fashion studio and portfolio manager. We build fashion brands from zero for creators — and we scale existing brands past $1 million in annual revenue.

01

Phase One · For creators

Create.

Your vision, turned into a production-ready clothing line. Every garment designed with intention, documented to the highest standard.

Step 01Design
  • One-to-one design consultation
  • Collection design & creative direction
  • Technical drawings & full technical documents
Step 02Production
  • Sample development
  • Factory production through our partners
  • From brief to finished garment
02

Phase Two · For creators

Launch.

The commercial engine around your brand — campaign, store, and the retail systems to sustain long-term growth.

Step 03Campaign
  • Campaign direction & consultation
  • Content production & shoot direction
  • Brand storytelling
Step 04Market
  • E-commerce store build & management
  • Paid & organic channel strategy
  • Inventory, fulfilment & retail operations
03

For existing brands

Scale.

Advisory · Mentorship · Growth

For fashion brands already trading. We come inside the business as advisors and mentors — sharpening the brand, the offer and the operation — and scale it past $1 million in annual revenue.

Built because established brands kept asking the same question: how do we monetize what we've built?

Masters Linea

Events

The
Mastermind.

The Mastermind is where Neo Masters opens the playbook — private evenings on how fashion brands are actually built. Staged and shot by his studio, Masters Linea. By invitation.

Mastermind 01 · Canggu

How to build a million-dollar clothing brand in 12 months.

Neo Masters invites some of the leading fashion founders for a private evening — a mastermind on the frameworks behind building a clothing and fashion brand from zero. Hosted by Neo Masters. Shot and staged by Masters Linea.

Full talk — coming to YouTube

Mastermind 02 · Bali

How to sell identity:
the high-end fashion game.

The techniques and frameworks behind luxury brands — how the world's most desired labels sell identity, not clothing.
